ui.recipesDescription: Combine universal flavors and the crunch of Ranchitas with these delicious and easy-to-prepare options.

questions.text: In your group of friends, you are...?

options.text: The international one, the one who always brings something different 🌎
The one who brings excitement even on a Monday 😏
The charming one… everyone melts for YOU 🧀
The fresh one, the one who always calms everyone down 🌿

questions.text: How do you flirt with your crush?

options.text: I'm their first like of the day 😏
Direct and fearless 🔥
I don't flirt, they flirt with me 🧀
I write something different, something that stands out 🌎

questions.text: In summer, you are the one who…

options.text: Plans the trip without thinking twice 🌎
The hottest of the hot 🔥
Melts from the heat 🧀
Relaxed and cool 🥑

questions.text: You're invited to a party and you…

options.text: Show up with something different that everyone wants to try 🌎
Are the one who lights up the room effortlessly 🔥
If there's no cheese, I'm not going 🧀
I'm the portable guacamole for the party 🥑
'Working on it, exploring options' 🌎
'The hottest match of my life hasn't arrived yet' 🔥
'They melt for me or next' 🧀
Aunt, I'm lucky if I find myself 🥑

questions.text: If you were a type of vibe, you'd be…

options.text: 'Different, with an international flow' 🌎
'Intense, fun, and noticeable' 🔥
'Classic, reliable, and always good' 🧀
'Fresh, relaxed, and stylish' 🥑

questions.text: When you meet new people, you…

options.text: Stand out because you're different 🌎
Connect because you have energy 🔥
Are liked without effort 🧀
Go with the flow without pressure 🥑

questions.text: You receive a 5-minute voice message, you:

options.text: Listen to it at 2x speed… and still don't understand anything 🌎
Listen to ALL of it and even reply with another voice message 🔥
Read the transcript… if there is one 🧀
Leave it on read… whatever 🥑

results.title: YOU ARE BUFFALO RANCH
results.description: You are the different one in the group. You like to try new things, break away from the typical, and always bring something unexpected. 👉 You are that flavor you didn't know you needed… until you try it.

results.title: YOU ARE NACHO EXCITANTE
results.description: You are the one who brings everything to life. Energy, excitement, and moments that are truly felt. 👉 If the plan needs excitement… that's where you come in.

results.title: YOU ARE NACHO QUESO
results.description: You are the reliable one. The one who never fails. The irresistible one. The one everyone chooses and the one who always fits in. 👉 You are that flavor that is always there… and always enjoyed.

results.title: YOU ARE GUACAMOLE
results.description: You are a fresh and stylish flow. A green flag in every sense. 👉 You are that flavor that surprises and becomes a favorite.
